temporal_description:
(00:00-00:05) A silhouette of a person stands against a dramatic, cloudy sky at dusk. The sky is filled with dark, swirling clouds, illuminated by a bright, setting sun that casts a warm, orange glow. The person's head and shoulders are visible, but their features are obscured by the darkness. The Chinese characters '风行网' (Fengxing.com) are displayed in the top-left corner. (Storyline: This opening shot establishes a somber and mysterious tone, introducing a solitary figure in a vast, atmospheric setting.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A slow, melancholic choral piece begins, with a male vocalist singing a mournful melody.)
(00:06-00:09) The camera slowly zooms out, revealing more of the dramatic sky. The clouds are thick and textured, with the sun's light breaking through in patches, creating a beautiful but somber atmosphere. The silhouette of the person remains the central focus. (Storyline: The slow zoom-out reinforces the feeling of isolation and emphasizes the grand, indifferent nature of the environment.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The choral music continues, with the male vocalist singing a sustained, sorrowful note.)
